home.description: Upload DXF parts, prepare geometry, and move into the production workspace for bounded nesting runs and result review.
workspace.description: Structured 3-screen workflow for DXF upload, geometry validation, material setup, and bounded nesting runs.
workspace.backendConnectionFailed: Backend connection failed. Start the API server and verify VITE_API_BASE_URL.
screen1.validationGateSubtitle: Press Next once. Nestora will clean and validate the uploaded geometry automatically.
screen1.summarySubtitle: Upload list, file status, and validation readiness.
screen2.summarySubtitle: Material state stays in memory when moving Back or Next.
screen2.navigationSubtitle: Move back without losing uploaded files or parameter values.
screen2.scaleWarning: Acknowledge the scale warning before moving to Screen 3.
screen2.previousRun: A previous run is available and will still be shown on Screen 3.
screen3.runControlSubtitle: Start the current bounded nesting pass or repeat the previous run.
screen3.artifactsSubtitle: Export state is explicit even when the backend has not produced every format yet.
screen3.batchOverviewSubtitle: Review the current batch metadata and visible order groups before or after the run.
screen3.batchOverviewEmpty: No explicit orders are assigned yet. Unassigned parts will stay in the default batch.
screen3.runSummarySubtitle: Visible result signals for the current or last completed pass.
artifacts.dxfUnavailable: DXF export state is unavailable until job metadata is loaded.
artifacts.pdfUnavailable: PDF report state is unavailable until job metadata is loaded.
artifacts.jsonAvailable: JSON result is ready to download from the current job.
artifacts.jsonUnavailable: JSON result is unavailable until a job finishes.
upload.title: Upload DXF
upload.subtitle: Import one or more DXF files and extract closed polygons for the current nesting job.
orderEditor.title: Assign order to selected parts
orderEditor.subtitle: Apply one order id, order name, and priority to multiple selected parts at once.
orderEditor.actionHint: Use this to group several uploaded parts under one order without editing them one by one.
orderEditor.noParts: Enable and validate parts first to use batch order assignment.
nesting.title: Material & Parameters
nesting.subtitle: Define the material, sheet geometry, rotation policy, and part behavior before moving to the run screen.
nesting.materialHint: Select a preset, save the current values as a custom material, or continue with manual entry.
nesting.productionIntent: Select the production intent for this job.
nesting.groupedOrdersIncluded: {count} order group(s) will be included in this batch.
nesting.defaultBatchGrouping: Parts without an explicit order stay in the default batch grouping.
nesting.fillSheetHelp: Keep placing enabled parts until no more geometry fits. Mark a part as Fill only to exclude the others from this fill run.
nesting.batchQuantityHelp: Each enabled part must have a requested quantity. The result will report placed and remaining counts per part.
nesting.debug: Return geometry debug payload and bbox overlays
nesting.scaleAcknowledge: I understand the scale warning and still want to run nesting
nesting.cleanupRequired: Cleanup must produce at least one enabled part with valid geometry before nesting can start.
nesting.uploadFilesFirst: Upload DXF files first to build the part list.
nesting.noValidPolygon: No valid polygon is available for nesting.
nesting.enterSheetParameters: Enter sheet size and nesting parameters.
nesting.backendPayloadHint: Sheet units, gap / kerf, rotation policy, and objective are mapped directly into the backend request payload for Screen 3 runs.
metrics.title: Result Metrics
metrics.subtitle: Material usage and placement output.
metrics.empty: Run a successful nesting job to see yield, scrap, and sheet usage metrics.
metrics.economicsSubtitle: Sheet spend and estimated value split based on the current result.
metrics.perPartTracking: Per-part requested, placed, and remaining counts are tracked for the whole job.
metrics.mixedSheetResultSubtitle: {count} part types were placed in this job result.
metrics.repeatedFillResultSubtitle: The backend kept placing parts until no enabled geometry could fit. Total placements: {count}.
metrics.partialFitBatchResultSubtitle: Remaining quantities are explicit because the backend stopped only after no more requested parts could fit on the available sheets.
metrics.partsDidNotFullyFit: Parts that did not fully fit:
job.title: Job Status
job.subtitle: Track the active nesting run.
job.backendUnavailable: Backend unavailable. Check the API server and VITE_API_BASE_URL.
job.failed: Job failed. Fix inputs and run again.
viewer.title: Layout Viewer
viewer.empty: Upload and process a DXF to see geometry here.
empty.title: Turn DXF geometry into production-ready nesting.
empty.description: Import parts, validate geometry, run real nesting jobs, and review material usage from one dark, production-focused workspace.
status.noMaterials: No presets saved yet. Use manual entry or create one.
status.materialNameRequiredForPreset: Material name is required before saving a preset.
status.materialPresetSelectBeforeUpdate: Select a material preset before updating it.
status.rotationRequired: Rotation step must be greater than 0.
status.enablePart: Enable at least one part before running nesting.
status.validPolygonRequired: At least one enabled part must have a valid cleaned polygon.
status.batchQuantityRequired: Batch Quantity mode requires quantity >= 1 for every enabled part.
status.uploadBeforeContinue: Upload at least one DXF file before continuing.
status.noFilesYet: No files have been added to the workflow yet.
status.someFilesFailed: Some files failed to import. Fix the upload list before continuing.
status.validating: Validating uploaded files and cleaning geometry...
status.validationFailed: Validation failed. Review the file issues below.
status.validationPassed: Validation passed. {count} cleaned polygon(s) are ready.
status.resolveErrors: Resolve the highlighted parameter issues before moving to Screen 3.
status.parametersPreserved: Parameters are preserved as you move between screens.
status.jobTimedOut: The job took too long to finish. Try again or check the backend worker.
status.fileImportNotFinished: File import did not finish successfully.
status.cleanupLargestPolygon: Multiple cleaned polygons found. Nesting uses the largest polygon from this file.
status.uploadStatusUploading: Uploading DXF files to the backend...
status.uploadStatusSuccess: Upload succeeded. {count} file(s) are ready for validation.
status.uploadStatusFailed: One or more uploads failed. Review the uploaded-files list.
status.uploadStatusInitial: Step 1: Select one or more DXF files to build a multi-part nesting job.
status.cleanupStatusRunning: Cleaning geometry for each uploaded part...
status.cleanupStatusComplete: Validation complete. Part geometry is cleaned and ready for the next screen.
status.cleanupStatusWaiting: Uploaded files are waiting for Screen 1 validation.
status.nestingStatusFailed: Previous job failed. Update inputs if needed and run again.
status.nestingStatusRepeat: Step 6: Run another bounded optimization pass to try improving the current result.
status.nestingStatusReady: Step 6: Review the part list, choose the mode, and run nesting.
status.scaleWarningDetected: Detected source units: {units}. Largest imported part extent is {partExtent}, while the sheet max extent is {sheetExtent}. Ratio: {ratio}x. This usually means DXF units and sheet units do not match.
